headline: INSULET CORP (NASDAQ:PODD) Fits the Affordable Growth Mold with Strong Momentum and Reasonable Valuation
summary: Insulet Corp (PODD) passes an Affordable Growth screen with strong revenue and EPS growth, reasonable valuation, and high profitability, making it a solid GARP candidate in medical devices.

headline: Insulet Reveals New Data Supporting Breakthrough Omnipod® 6 and Fully Closed-Loop AID Systems Designed to Improve Outcomes, Reduce Effort, and Unlock Barriers to Care
summary: ACTON, Mass., June 06, 2026--Insulet Reveals New Data Supporting Breakthrough Omnipod® 6 and Fully Closed-Loop AID Systems Designed to Improve Outcomes, Reduce Effort
